summary_en: FY5/26 final dividend raised to ¥37/share from ¥27/share forecast; combined with interim ¥11/share, full-year dividend ¥48/share. Payout ratio maintained at 30%+ under mid-term plan capital allocation framework.
title_en: Notice of Correction (Increase) to Forecast Period-End Dividend for Fiscal Year Ending May 2026
translation_en_brief: Kaneko Seeds announced on 15 May 2026 that its board has revised upward the forecast period-end dividend for FY5/26 (year ending 31 May 2026) to ¥37 per share from a prior forecast of ¥27 per share, representing a ¥10 per share increase. Combined with the interim dividend already paid at ¥11 per share, the full-year dividend is now forecast at ¥48 per share. The company cited recent business performance trends, financial condition, and capital efficiency metrics as drivers of the increase. The revision aligns with the company's capital allocation policy, which targets a payout ratio of 30% or above while maintaining the equity ratio, alongside opportunistic share buybacks in response to market conditions and continuous enhancement of shareholder returns under the medium-term management plan.
